subject: fix(ux): address review issues in UX improvements
body:
- Fix invalid Tailwind `border-3` class → `border-2` on export spinner
- Fix nested `<button>` in SaveLoadModal (design row wrapping ConfirmButton)
  Changed outer element to `<div role="button">` with keyboard handler
- Add `addToast` to all useCallback dependency arrays in ExportButtons
- Move `showMoreOptions` useState to top of component (hook ordering)
- Stabilize CanvasCellOverlay key (remove selection state from key)
- Add `role="dialog"` and `aria-modal` to keyboard shortcuts overlay
- Add Escape key handler for shortcuts overlay
- Add `aria-label` to zoom control buttons
- Fix error toasts to use `role="alert"` with `aria-live="assertive"`
- Fix zoom minimum from 10% → 25%, add float rounding to prevent drift

Tags: ui, accessibility, bugfix
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ux-improvements
Semver: patch
